topic: translating verbal expressions to algebraic expressions
latex:
Complete the table.

\begin{tabular}{|p{7cm}|c|c|}
\hline
 & True & False \\
\hline
The expression for ``32 increased by a number $c$'' is $32 + c$. & & \\
\hline
The expression for ``13 more than a number $v$'' is $13v$. & & \\
\hline
The expression for ``4 more than a number $x$ squared'' is $4 + x^2$. & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
